summary: Iteration 14 - Bug fixes verification: All 3 issues are FIXED. 1) Image upload in admin panel works (dropzone visible, file input present, click-to-upload and drag-drop supported via proper handlers), 2) Phone/WhatsApp fields in EnrollmentPage and CartPage have country code dropdown (+971 default) with 10-digit limit enforced, 3) Strike-off prices display correctly (offer price in gold, regular price with line-through). All 9 backend tests passed. UI verification via Playwright confirmed all fixes.

issues: 404 errors for some external image resources (divineirishealing.com) - non-blocking, using fallback images

critical_code_review_comments: ImageUploader.jsx: Properly implements drag-drop with onDrop, onDragOver, onDragLeave handlers and fileInputRef for click-to-upload
AdminPanel.jsx: Pricing table correctly shows 'Offer AED' column that saves to offer_price_aed field (line 348)
AdminPanel.jsx: editProgram() correctly loads offer_price_aed when editing program (line 82)
EnrollmentPage.jsx: phone_code and wa_code fields with COUNTRIES dropdown (lines 119-134)
EnrollmentPage.jsx: Phone input has maxLength={10} with digit-only filter (line 123)
CartPage.jsx: Same phone_code/wa_code dropdowns and 10-digit limit (lines 186-199)
CurrencyContext.js: getOfferPrice() handles non-tier programs for aed/inr/usd currencies (lines 73-77)
ProgramsSection.jsx: Line-through display at lines 96-97 shows offer price in gold and regular price struck through
seed_data_creation: Test program with offer prices created and deleted for strike-off verification. Enrollment test data created during API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) ImageUploader works with click and drag-drop, 2) Phone/WhatsApp fields have country code dropdowns with 10-digit limit in both EnrollmentPage and CartPage, 3) Strike-off prices display correctly with offer price in gold and regular price with line-through. Phone OTP is MOCKED (mock_otp returned in API response).

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing
mocked_features.stripe_payments: Cannot fully test Stripe payment flow - requires real payment
